case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. MICHELLE N NORMAN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: DILIGENCE (TRANSACTION ID # 73836752) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
